rationale: In the citing paper, Tirunillai and Tellis (2014) is used mainly to note that LDA has been applied in marketing and can help with brand association analysis. The core methodological setup for the LDA benchmark is attributed to Blei et al. (2003) and a toolbox implementation, not to specific procedures or findings from Tirunillai and Tellis. The cited paper does not appear to shape hypotheses, model construction, or interpretation in a distinct way beyond background support for using LDA.
